offer: For medical clinics processing 10–20 patients/day, inefficient data analysis causes delayed decision-making. We provide streamlined analytics instead of manual data entry and analysis using spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient patient data analysis leading to delayed decision-making.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical clinic support
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar issues
Direct message 20-50 clinics with demo video
Participate in community forums for clinic tools
try_it: Let users try dashboard for patient metrics and data visualization tools on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing patient data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
